---
title: "明治大学"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(reactable)
library(plotly)
library(htmltools)
library(lubridate)

TEAM <- "明治"

final_ratings <- read_csv("../../data_out/ratings/final_ratings.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))

rating_hist <- read_csv("../../data_out/ratings/rating_history.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))

game_results <- read_csv("../../data_out/ratings/game_results_with_ratings.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  mutate(gamedate = as.Date(gamedate))

teams_info <- readxl::read_excel("../../data_out/teamdata.xlsx") |>
  mutate(
    c1 = paste0("#", ColorCode1),
    c2 = paste0("#", if_else(is.na(ColorCode2), ColorCode1, ColorCode2)),
    c3 = paste0(
      "#",
      if_else(
        is.na(ColorCode3),
        if_else(is.na(ColorCode2), ColorCode1, ColorCode2),
        ColorCode3
      )
    )
  )

TEAM_SLUG <- c(
  "東大" = "todai",
  "明治" = "meiji",
  "慶應" = "keio",
  "早稲田" = "waseda",
  "立教" = "rikkyo",
  "法政" = "hosei"
)

LEAGUE_SLUG <- c("東京六大学" = "tokyo6")

team_url <- function(team, prefix = "../") {
  slug <- TEAM_SLUG[[team]]
  if (is.null(slug) || is.na(slug)) {
    return("#")
  }
  paste0(prefix, "university/", slug, ".html")
}

league_url <- function(league, prefix = "../") {
  slug <- LEAGUE_SLUG[[league]]
  if (is.null(slug) || is.na(slug)) {
    return("#")
  }
  paste0(prefix, "league/", slug, ".html")
}

team_info <- teams_info |> filter(TeamShortName == TEAM) |> slice(1)
team_full_name <- if (nrow(team_info) > 0) team_info$TeamName else TEAM
league_name <- if (nrow(team_info) > 0) team_info$LeagueName else "不明"
c1 <- if (nrow(team_info) > 0) team_info$c1 else "#17324A"

all_ranked <- final_ratings |> arrange(rank)
team_row <- all_ranked |> filter(team == TEAM)
current_rating <- if (nrow(team_row) > 0) team_row$display_rating[[1]] else NA_real_
current_rank <- if (nrow(team_row) > 0) team_row$rank[[1]] else NA_integer_
total_teams <- nrow(all_ranked)

current_year <- max(year(game_results$gamedate[game_results$gamedate <= Sys.Date()]))
available_yrs <- sort(unique(year(
  game_results$gamedate[
    (game_results$team1 == TEAM | game_results$team2 == TEAM) &
      game_results$gamedate <= Sys.Date()
  ]
)), decreasing = TRUE)
default_yr <- if (length(available_yrs) > 0) as.character(available_yrs[[1]]) else as.character(current_year)

global_mean <- mean(rating_hist$rating)
global_sd <- sd(rating_hist$rating)
to_disp <- function(r) round(50 + 10 * (r - global_mean) / global_sd, 1)

team_hist_all <- rating_hist |>
  filter(team == TEAM, year(date) >= 2001) |>
  arrange(date)

stats_max <- if (nrow(team_hist_all) > 0) round(max(team_hist_all$display_rating), 1) else NA_real_
stats_min <- if (nrow(team_hist_all) > 0) round(min(team_hist_all$display_rating), 1) else NA_real_
stats_avg <- if (nrow(team_hist_all) > 0) round(mean(team_hist_all$display_rating), 1) else NA_real_

season_bg_df <- game_results |>
  filter(team1 == TEAM | team2 == TEAM) |>
  select(gamedate, season) |>
  group_by(yr_val = year(gamedate), season) |>
  summarise(bg_start = min(gamedate), bg_end = max(gamedate), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(bg_fill = if_else(season == "春", "rgba(31,93,77,0.07)", "rgba(191,29,53,0.07)"))

season_end <- game_results |>
  filter(team1 == TEAM | team2 == TEAM) |>
  mutate(yr_val = year(gamedate)) |>
  group_by(yr_val, season) |>
  summarise(end_date = max(gamedate), .groups = "drop") |>
  filter(end_date <= Sys.Date()) |>
  mutate(display_rating = map_dbl(end_date, function(d) {
    snap <- rating_hist |> filter(team == TEAM, date <= d) |> slice_tail(n = 1)
    if (nrow(snap) == 0) {
      return(NA_real_)
    }
    snap$display_rating[[1]]
  })) |>
  filter(!is.na(display_rating)) |>
  arrange(desc(yr_val), desc(season == "秋")) |>
  mutate(label = paste0(yr_val, " ", season), rating = round(display_rating, 1)) |>
  select(label, rating)

team_games <- game_results |>
  filter(team1 == TEAM | team2 == TEAM) |>
  mutate(
    yr = as.character(year(gamedate)),
    is_team1 = team1 == TEAM,
    team_a = TEAM,
    team_b = if_else(is_team1, team2, team1),
    score_a = if_else(is_team1, score1, score2),
    score_b = if_else(is_team1, score2, score1),
    rate_a = if_else(is_team1, r1_before, r2_before),
    rate_b = if_else(is_team1, r2_before, r1_before),
    delta_own = if_else(is_team1, delta, -delta)
  ) |>
  left_join(
    teams_info |> select(TeamShortName, TeamName, c1),
    by = c("team_b" = "TeamShortName")
  ) |>
  rename(name_b = TeamName, c1_b = c1) |>
  mutate(
    name_a = team_full_name,
    c1_a = c1,
    disp_a = to_disp(rate_a),
    disp_b = to_disp(rate_b),
    delta_disp = round(10 * delta_own / global_sd, 1),
    score_dash = ""
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(gamedate)) |>
  select(
    yr, gamedate, gametype,
    team_a, name_a, c1_a, disp_a, score_a,
    score_dash, score_b, team_b, name_b, c1_b, disp_b,
    delta_disp
  )

search_targets <- bind_rows(
  teams_info |>
    transmute(
      label = TeamName,
      search = paste(TeamName, TeamShortName, LeagueName),
      url = paste0("university/", TEAM_SLUG[TeamShortName], ".html")
    ),
  teams_info |>
    distinct(LeagueName) |>
    transmute(
      label = LeagueName,
      search = LeagueName,
      url = paste0("league/", LEAGUE_SLUG[LeagueName], ".html")
    )
) |>
  filter(!is.na(url))

search_targets_json <- jsonlite::toJSON(search_targets, dataframe = "rows", auto_unbox = TRUE)

matchup_cell <- function(label, team, color, rating) {
  tags$div(
    class = "matchup-cell",
    tags$div(class = "team-color-bar", style = paste0("background:", color)),
    tags$div(
      class = "matchup-text",
      tags$a(
        href = team_url(team),
        class = "team-link-inline",
        style = paste0("color:", color),
        label
      ),
      tags$span(class = "rating-badge", paste0("試合前 ", sprintf("%.1f", rating)))
    )
  )
}

score_cell <- function(score, opp_score) {
  cls <- if (!is.na(score) && !is.na(opp_score) && score > opp_score) {
    "score-cell score-winner"
  } else {
    "score-cell"
  }
  tags$span(class = cls, ifelse(is.na(score), "-", score))
}
```

```{r header}
search_options <- tags$datalist(
  id = "site-search-options",
  lapply(search_targets$label, function(lbl) tags$option(value = lbl))
)

hero_script <- glue::glue(
  "
  (function() {{
    const targets = {search_targets_json};
    const defaultYear = '{default_yr}';
    const plotSelector = '#team-rating-chart .plotly, #team-rating-chart .js-plotly-plot';

    function normalize(value) {{
      return String(value || '').replace(/\\s+/g, '').toLowerCase();
    }}

    function syncYear(value) {{
      if (!value) return;
      window.localStorage.setItem('cbr-selected-year', value);
      document.querySelectorAll('[data-global-year]').forEach(function(select) {{
        if ([].some.call(select.options, function(opt) {{ return opt.value === value; }})) {{
          select.value = value;
        }}
      }});
    }}

    function applyYear(year) {{
      syncYear(year);

      function updateTable() {{
        if (window.Reactable) {{
          Reactable.setFilter('team-games-table', 'yr', year);
        }} else {{
          setTimeout(updateTable, 100);
        }}
      }}

      function updatePlot() {{
        if (!window.Plotly) {{
          setTimeout(updatePlot, 200);
          return;
        }}
        const plot = document.querySelector(plotSelector);
        if (!plot) {{
          setTimeout(updatePlot, 200);
          return;
        }}
        Plotly.relayout(plot, {{
          'xaxis.range': [year + '-01-01', year + '-12-31']
        }});
      }}

      updateTable();
      updatePlot();
    }}

    function goSearch() {{
      const input = document.querySelector('[data-search-input]');
      if (!input) return;
      const key = normalize(input.value);
      if (!key) return;
      const match = targets.find(function(target) {{
        return normalize(target.label) === key || normalize(target.search).indexOf(key) !== -1;
      }});
      if (match) {{
        syncYear(document.querySelector('[data-global-year]')?.value || defaultYear);
        window.location.href = '../' + match.url;
      }}
    }}

    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {{
      const year = window.localStorage.getItem('cbr-selected-year') || defaultYear;
      syncYear(year);
      applyYear(year);

      document.querySelectorAll('[data-global-year]').forEach(function(select) {{
        select.addEventListener('change', function(event) {{
          applyYear(event.target.value);
        }});
      }});

      document.querySelectorAll('[data-search-go]').forEach(function(button) {{
        button.addEventListener('click', function() {{
          goSearch();
        }});
      }});

      document.querySelectorAll('[data-search-input]').forEach(function(input) {{
        input.addEventListener('keydown', function(event) {{
          if (event.key === 'Enter') {{
            event.preventDefault();
            goSearch();
          }}
        }});
      }});
    }});
  }})();
  "
)

rank_str <- if (!is.na(current_rank)) {
  paste0("全国 ", current_rank, " 位 / ", total_teams, " チーム")
} else {
  "集計中"
}

latest_season_value <- if (nrow(season_end) > 0) season_end$rating[[1]] else NA_real_
latest_season_label <- if (nrow(season_end) > 0) season_end$label[[1]] else "データなし"

tagList(
  div(
    class = "detail-panel",
    div(
      class = "detail-toolbar",
      div(
        class = "control-block",
        div(class = "control-label", "大学・リーグ検索"),
        div(
          class = "search-shell",
          tags$input(
            class = "search-input",
            type = "search",
            placeholder = "大学名またはリーグ名を入力",
            list = "site-search-options",
            `data-search-input` = "site"
          ),
          tags$button(class = "control-button", type = "button", `data-search-go` = "site", "移動")
        )
      ),
      div(
        class = "control-block",
        div(class = "control-label", "表示年度"),
        tags$select(
          class = "year-select",
          `data-global-year` = "site",
          lapply(available_yrs, function(yr) tags$option(value = yr, as.character(yr)))
        )
      )
    ),
    div(
      class = "detail-header",
      div(
        div(class = "detail-eyebrow", "University"),
        h1(class = "detail-title", style = paste0("color:", c1), team_full_name),
        p(
          class = "detail-subtitle",
          tags$a(href = league_url(league_name), class = "detail-link", league_name)
        )
      ),
      div(
        class = "detail-value-panel",
        div(class = "detail-eyebrow", rank_str),
        div(class = "detail-value", style = paste0("color:", c1), ifelse(is.na(current_rating), "-", sprintf("%.1f", current_rating))),
        div(class = "detail-subtitle", "最新レーティング")
      )
    ),
    div(
      class = "summary-strip",
      div(
        class = "summary-item",
        div(class = "summary-label", "最高レート"),
        div(class = "summary-value", ifelse(is.na(stats_max), "-", sprintf("%.1f", stats_max)))
      ),
      div(
        class = "summary-item",
        div(class = "summary-label", "最低レート"),
        div(class = "summary-value", ifelse(is.na(stats_min), "-", sprintf("%.1f", stats_min)))
      ),
      div(
        class = "summary-item",
        div(class = "summary-label", "平均レート"),
        div(class = "summary-value", ifelse(is.na(stats_avg), "-", sprintf("%.1f", stats_avg)))
      ),
      div(
        class = "summary-item",
        div(class = "summary-label", latest_season_label),
        div(class = "summary-value", ifelse(is.na(latest_season_value), "-", sprintf("%.1f", latest_season_value)))
      )
    ),
    search_options,
    tags$script(HTML(hero_script))
  )
)
```

## レーティング推移

```{r rating-chart}
team_hist <- rating_hist |>
  filter(team == TEAM) |>
  arrange(date)

if (nrow(team_hist) > 0) {
  game_dates <- sort(unique(team_hist$date))
  if (length(game_dates) > 1) {
    gap_df <- tibble(d_prev = head(game_dates, -1), d_next = tail(game_dates, -1)) |>
      filter(as.numeric(d_next - d_prev) > 45)
    range_breaks <- if (nrow(gap_df) > 0) {
      lapply(seq_len(nrow(gap_df)), function(i) {
        list(bounds = list(as.character(gap_df$d_prev[[i]] + 1), as.character(gap_df$d_next[[i]])))
      })
    } else {
      list()
    }
  } else {
    range_breaks <- list()
  }

  season_shapes <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(season_bg_df)), function(i) {
    list(
      type = "rect",
      xref = "x",
      yref = "paper",
      x0 = as.character(season_bg_df$bg_start[[i]]),
      x1 = as.character(season_bg_df$bg_end[[i]]),
      y0 = 0,
      y1 = 1,
      fillcolor = season_bg_df$bg_fill[[i]],
      line = list(width = 0),
      layer = "below"
    )
  })

  plot_widget <- plot_ly(
    data = team_hist,
    x = ~date,
    y = ~display_rating,
    type = "scatter",
    mode = "lines+markers",
    name = team_full_name,
    line = list(color = c1, width = 3),
    marker = list(color = c1, size = 6),
    text = ~paste0(format(date, "%Y/%m/%d"), "<br>レート: ", round(display_rating, 1)),
    hoverinfo = "text"
  ) |>
    layout(
      xaxis = list(
        title = "",
        gridcolor = "#D6DFD8",
        zeroline = FALSE,
        rangebreaks = range_breaks,
        tickformat = "%Y/%m",
        nticks = 12
      ),
      yaxis = list(title = "レート", gridcolor = "#D6DFD8", zeroline = FALSE),
      shapes = season_shapes,
      margin = list(l = 60, r = 20, t = 20, b = 70),
      paper_bgcolor = "white",
      plot_bgcolor = "white",
      font = list(family = "Segoe UI Variable Display, Segoe UI, sans-serif")
    )

  div(
    class = "chart-shell",
    div(id = "team-rating-chart", plot_widget)
  )
} else {
  div(class = "copy-shell", tags$p("表示できる推移データがありません。"))
}
```

## 試合一覧

```{r games-table}
div(
  class = "table-shell",
  reactable(
    team_games,
    filterable = TRUE,
    defaultPageSize = 15,
    showPageSizeOptions = TRUE,
    pageSizeOptions = c(15, 50, 200),
    highlight = TRUE,
    elementId = "team-games-table",
    columns = list(
      yr = colDef(show = FALSE, filterable = TRUE),
      gamedate = colDef(
        name = "日時",
        width = 112,
        align = "right",
        format = colFormat(date = TRUE, locales = "ja-JP"),
        filterable = FALSE
      ),
      gametype = colDef(name = "試合種別", minWidth = 120, filterable = FALSE),
      name_a = colDef(
        name = "大学A",
        minWidth = 190,
        filterable = FALSE,
        cell = function(v, ri) {
          row <- team_games[ri, ]
          matchup_cell(row$name_a, row$team_a, row$c1_a, row$disp_a)
        }
      ),
      score_a = colDef(
        name = "A",
        width = 62,
        align = "center",
        filterable = FALSE,
        cell = function(v, ri) score_cell(v, team_games$score_b[[ri]])
      ),
      score_dash = colDef(
        name = "",
        width = 36,
        align = "center",
        filterable = FALSE,
        cell = function() tags$span(class = "dash-cell", "-")
      ),
      score_b = colDef(
        name = "B",
        width = 62,
        align = "center",
        filterable = FALSE,
        cell = function(v, ri) score_cell(v, team_games$score_a[[ri]])
      ),
      name_b = colDef(
        name = "大学B",
        minWidth = 190,
        filterable = FALSE,
        cell = function(v, ri) {
          row <- team_games[ri, ]
          matchup_cell(row$name_b, row$team_b, row$c1_b, row$disp_b)
        }
      ),
      delta_disp = colDef(
        name = "変動",
        width = 76,
        align = "right",
        filterable = FALSE,
        cell = function(v) {
          if (is.na(v)) {
            return(tags$span())
          }
          cls <- if (v > 0) {
            "change-up"
          } else if (v < 0) {
            "change-down"
          } else {
            "change-none"
          }
          fmt <- if (v > 0) paste0("+", sprintf("%.1f", v)) else sprintf("%.1f", v)
          tags$span(class = cls, fmt)
        }
      ),
      team_a = colDef(show = FALSE),
      team_b = colDef(show = FALSE),
      c1_a = colDef(show = FALSE),
      c1_b = colDef(show = FALSE),
      disp_a = colDef(show = FALSE),
      disp_b = colDef(show = FALSE)
    )
  )
)
```

## シーズン終了時レート

```{r season-ratings}
if (nrow(season_end) > 0) {
  div(
    class = "table-shell",
    reactable(
      season_end,
      pagination = FALSE,
      highlight = TRUE,
      columns = list(
        label = colDef(name = "シーズン", minWidth = 140),
        rating = colDef(
          name = "終了時レート",
          width = 120,
          align = "right",
          cell = function(v) tags$span(class = "rating-number", sprintf("%.1f", v))
        )
      )
    )
  )
} else {
  div(class = "copy-shell", tags$p("表示できるシーズンデータがありません。"))
}
```

<div class="back-links">
  <a href="../index.html" class="back-link">&#8592; ランキングに戻る</a>
  <a href="../methodology.html" class="back-link">&#8594; 計算方法の詳細</a>
</div>
